title: NPU nm1 hard-sigmoid vec enable
hypothesis: A bounded int8 hard-sigmoid op can be integrated into the fixed nm1 vec path and physically characterized as a hard-sigmoid-enabled NPU block, providing the correct architecture_block physical source before any later hard-sigmoid mapper or terminal-output evaluation.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can we produce an accepted hard-sigmoid-enabled nm1 design point with real physical metrics before any Layer 2 hard-sigmoid campaign runs?
include: one bounded hard-sigmoid-enabled nm1 block design/config variant
one focused Layer 1 physical sweep on that integrated design
exclude: broad nonlinear-family claims beyond bounded hard-sigmoid enablement
follow_on_broad_sweep: return to Layer 2 hard-sigmoid or broader terminal-family work only after this integrated physical source is accepted

expected_result.reason: the goal is to establish the first accepted hard-sigmoid-enabled nm1 block physical metrics
